description_long: This is an ornate, traditional-style chaise with a rich brown wooden frame featuring intricate carved detailing along the base and backrest. The seat consists of three thick, plush cushions upholstered in a patterned fabric with a classic, floral motif, complemented by matching backrest cushions and two decorative throw pillows. The backrest is gently curved and rises higher in the center, providing a regal silhouette, while the armrests are rolled and deeply padded, adding to the luxurious appearance. The legs are short, rounded, and finished in a dark wood tone, barely visible beneath the frame. The upholstery fabric appears textured and multi-toned, enhancing the visual depth and comfort of the piece. This chaise exudes a sense of elegance and comfort, suitable for upscale urban interiors or stylish public spaces.
description: A luxurious, traditional brown chaise with ornate wood carvings, plush patterned cushions, and rolled armrests, exuding elegance and comfort.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed carved wood frame, three seat cushions, three backrest cushions, and two decorative throw pillows.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the deep, rolled armrest and the layered arrangement of cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, carved wooden backrest with a gentle central arch and no visible cushions.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the rolled armrest and visible cushion layering.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is gently curved with a higher central arch, featuring carved wooden detailing along the top edge. It is segmented by three large, plush cushions and is visually framed by the ornate woodwork.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both sides have prominent, rolled armrests that are deeply padded and covered in matching upholstery.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, rounded, and made of dark-finished wood, mostly concealed beneath the frame, with a simple, sturdy design and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery features a classic, floral patterned fabric in shades of brown and beige, with a textured appearance and subtle variations in tone.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are three large seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all loose and plush, accompanied by two smaller decorative throw pillows placed at each end.
